Sri Vidyashankara Temple · Sringeri, Karnataka
The Foundation

Rooted in the Sacred
Tradition of Sringeri

"Understanding and realising our true nature is the ultimate purpose of human existence."

Aham Brahmaasmi Foundation® (ABF) is a registered public charitable trust operating under the divine blessings of the Jagadgurus of the Dakshinamnaya Sri Sharada Peetham, Sringeri — one of the four sacred Mathas established by Jagadguru Sri Adi Shankaracharya.

ABF offers a space where inquiry unfolds with clarity, reverence and depth. Through thoughtfully designed courses, guided reflection and continued study, it supports seekers in cultivating discernment and steadiness of mind.

📜
Authentic Tradition
Propagating Vedanta in its pristine form as expounded by Bhagavatpada Sri Adi Shankaracharya and the Sringeri Guru Parampara
🕉
Living Lineage
Learning within a 1,200-year-old living tradition that has preserved Advaitic wisdom in its most authentic form
🌏
Universal Access
Open to all seekers irrespective of age, gender, religion or caste — no prior knowledge of Sanskrit required
🪷
Global Mission
Programs conducted across India and internationally in Melbourne, Sydney, Singapore, Houston, Florida and online
Divine Blessings

Under the Grace of the Jagadgurus

All programs are conducted under the divine blessings and direct guidance of the Shankaracharyas of Dakshinamnaya Sri Sharada Peetham, Sringeri

Jagadguru Shankaracharya of Sringeri
Sri Sri Bharati Tirtha
Mahasannidhanam
36th Pontiff of Dakshinamnaya
Sri Sharada Peetham, Sringeri
ॐ
Jagadguru Shankaracharya of Sringeri
Sri Sri Vidhushekhara Bharati
Sannidhanam
Under whose direct and divine guidance
the Vedanta Immersion Programs are conducted

"The Advaita philosophy enshrined in the Upanishads has been graced to the various types of seeking communities by the World Preceptor Sri Adi Shankara Bhagavatpada. ABF is a medium created to share this sacred knowledge in its purest form."

Sacred Heritage

Sri Sharada Peetham
Sringeri — Cradle of Advaita

Founded by Jagadguru Sri Adi Shankaracharya on the banks of the sacred Tunga river, where the lamp of Vedantic wisdom has burned unbroken for over twelve centuries.

1200+ Years of Tradition
36 Pontiffs in Lineage
8 Languages of Teaching
Member Registration

Register for the Program

Complete the form below to enrol in your chosen program. A confirmation with joining instructions will be sent to your email.

Why Join ABF?
Experience Vedanta from an authentic living lineage rooted in the Sringeri Parampara
  • Live interactive sessions with qualified Acharyas from the Sringeri tradition
  • No prior knowledge of Sanskrit required — taught in English & regional languages
  • Accessible from any location worldwide — online or in-person
  • Curriculum rooted in traditional Sampradaya — no dilution or misinterpretation
  • Certificate of participation for eligible members
  • Community of sincere seekers across India and the world
  • Programs held at sacred Kshetras — Sringeri, Kalady and other divine locations
Available Batches
Batch A — Online Batch B — In-Person Batch C — Hybrid Batch D — Online

Aham Brahmaasmi Foundation®
A Unit of Dakshinamnaya Sri Sharada Peetham, Sringeri
Registered Public Charitable Trust
Propagating the pure and faithful teachings of Advaita Vedanta as expounded by Jagadguru Sri Adi Shankara Bhagavatpada and the revered Acharya Parampara of Sringeri — making the timeless wisdom of the Upanishads accessible to sincere seekers worldwide.
